description_long: This object is a multi-barreled shotgun with a robust, industrial appearance. It features four parallel barrels arranged horizontally, each made of dark, matte-finished metal, giving the weapon a heavy and formidable look. The receiver is cylindrical and metallic, seamlessly connecting the barrels to a wooden grip and handle, which is ergonomically shaped and stained a deep brown. The trigger and hammer mechanism are exposed, with the trigger guard being rounded and metallic, providing protection for the trigger. The overall design suggests a custom or fantasy-inspired firearm, with no visible stock and a compact, powerful form factor. The materials and construction indicate durability and a focus on function over ornamentation.
description: A heavy, four-barreled shotgun with a dark metal finish and a wooden pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and exposed hammer mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing all four barrels, the cylindrical receiver, and the full wooden grip.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden grip, rounded trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrels, receiver, and the ergonomic wooden handle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the four open barrel muzzles and the compact, clustered arrangement.
attribute_barrel_configuration: quad-barrel, horizontally aligned, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, metallic, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
